message:
fix: handle duplicate rig identity bead in gt rig dock (gt-d8681)

Add EnsureRigBead method that idempotently returns or creates rig
identity beads, handling Dolt query hiccups and race conditions.
Replaces ad-hoc Show-Create-Show fallback in rig_dock.go and
fragile CreateRigBead call in doctor rig_beads_check.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
